name: MIAMI BREEZE CAR CARE INC
business: We are a developer and distributor of automotive care products that provide a long-lasting, new car scent. Our car cleaning spray and leather conditioner simulate a new car smell, and the interior cleaner protects hard surfaces. We target pre-owned car dealers, luxury car owners, digital savvy millennials, automotive dealers, car wash outfits, rental car/ride share operators, online influencers, car enthusiasts, and caravan and camping enthusiasts.
sellsTo: Automotive dealers and car wash outfits
Rental car/Ride share operators (Uber, Lyft, Zoom car, Turo, etc.)

exposures.sentence: Car care products are high performance chemicals used to improve shine, gloss, and durability of vehicles.

We intend to target the following customers. Pre-owned car dealers Luxury car owners Digital savvy millennials Automotive dealers and car wash outfits Rental car/Ride share operators: Uber, Lyft, Zoom car, Turo, etc. Online Influencers Car enthusiasts Caravan and camping enthusiasts

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Gin City Group, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On February 28, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of 100% ownership of Gin City Group, Inc, a Florida corporation and its wholly-owned subsidiary, Gincity GmbH, a German-based corporation.

tamClaims.claim: The Global Car Care Products Market Size was estimated at $11.2 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 3.9% from 2025 to 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The Global Car Care Products Market Size was estimated at $11.2 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 3.9% from 2025 to 2030, driven by rising awareness of vehicle maintenance and the increase in vehicle ownership.
